stemHtml:
Refer to figure or to chart AT(HI)5 from Jeppessen GSPRM.
A pilot wishes to check their position using a radio navigation aid. The RB NDB (74°45'N 095°W) is tuned in the ADF. Given the following, calculate the direction of the position line from the NDB to the aircraft's position to be plotted on the Polar Stereographic Chart.

DR Position: 75°10'N 089°58'W
RMI Reading: 295°
